name: Metcash Limited
analysis: MTS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$3.1200, stop A$2.9205, target A$3.7185 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
